page: Microsoft Azure EC48as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor. It features 48 virtual CPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. There is no bundled local storage, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong CPU capabilities, with both single-core and multi-core stress-ng performance placing in the top 25%. Passmark memory testing ranks in the top 10%, reflecting efficient memory subsystem throughput, while uncached large-block memory read and write speeds remain in the middle 50%. Cryptographic operations perform well, as evidenced by a top 25% Passmark CPU encryption score. However, resource limitations are apparent in large-scale AI workloads; while small 135M model LLM inference is strong, text generation for a large 70B model falls into the bottom 10%.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC48as_cc_v5 offers a high-density memory profile relative to its dedicated compute cores, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage. The primary tradeoff is the complete reliance on external network-attached storage. This server is suited for memory-optimized workloads, database operations, software compilation, and medium-scale LLM prompt processing.
description: Microsoft Azure EC48as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 48 vCPUs, 24 physical cores, and a 3.525 GHz clock speed. It is configured with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core, but includes no local storage or GPUs. Benchmarks show strong CPU and encryption performance, with Passmark memory scores reaching the top 10%. However, large-scale LLM text generation is a notable bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 10%. Qualitatively, the server provides high memory density relative to compute resources, presenting a cost-efficient profile for workloads that utilize external premium storage rather than local drives. It is suited for memory-intensive database operations, software compilation, and moderate-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC48as_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 7763 processor, 384 GB of RAM, and no local storage, delivering top-tier memory benchmark performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC48as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and no local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized configuration featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-density RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores
384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
No bundled local storage, relying entirely on external Premium Storage
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases and software compilation
